languages.text: {n}Из вокса доносится короткая трель-прощание. Генетор отворачивается, однако визор на его затылке продолжает следить за вами.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Из вокса доносится короткая трель-прощание. Аугментатор разворачивается, но продолжает следить за вами визором на затылке.{/n}

languages.text: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Из вокса доносится короткая трель-прощание. Генетор отворачивается, однако визор на его затылке продолжает следить за вами.{/n}

{n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head seems to keep watching you.{/n}
{n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ジェネターは、短い別れを告げるような声で、あなたに別れを告げる。そして、ジェネターは振り返るが、彼の頭部のバイザーは、あなたをじっと見つめているようだった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head seems to keep watching you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: ジェネターは、短い別れを告げるような声で、あなたに別れを告げる。そして、ジェネターは振り返るが、彼の頭部のバイザーは、あなたをじっと見つめているようだった。

languages.text: {n}Vokstan kısa bir veda nağmesi çıkıyor. Genetör arkasını dönüyor ama başının arkasındaki vizörle seni izlemeyi sürdürüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vokstan kısa bir veda nağmesi çıkıyor. Genetör arkasını dönüyor ama başının arkasındaki vizörle seni izlemeyi sürdürüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El voco emite un breve trino de despedida. El genetor da media vuelta, pero el visor de la parte trasera de su cabeza sigue observándote.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El voco emite un breve trino de despedida. El genetor da media vuelta, pero el visor de la parte trasera de su cabeza sigue observándote.{/n}

languages.text: {n}音阵传出短促告别颤音。基因士转身，但他后脑勺上的目镜仍在注视着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵传出短促告别颤音。基因士转身，但他后脑勺上的目镜仍在注视着你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le vox émet un bref trille de salutation. Le genetor se détourne, mais la visière derrière sa tête continue à vous observer.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le vox émet un bref trille de salutation. Le genetor se détourne, mais la visière derrière sa tête continue à vous observer.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein Abschiedstriller ertönt aus dem Vox. Der Genetor wendet sich ab, aber der Visor an seinem Hinterkopf beobachtet dich weiter.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A brief trill of farewell comes from the vox. The Genetor turns away, but the visor on the back of his head keeps watching you.{/n}
